summary: 5 crates missing (frf-broker-iggy, frf-authz-keto, frf-identity-ory, frf-app, frf-postgres-cdc); gateway has no subscription wiring. tonic 0.14 confirmed current; Iggy fork must be audited at kickoff. Per-event Keto latency is the critical scaling risk — subscribe-time DashMap cache required in Phase 1. Plan should order: frf-app first (no deps), then adapters in parallel, then gateway mux last.
